parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed at which the wah effects sweep, or how fast the effect spins and cycles.
parameters-en.Freq: Controls the range of the filter emphasis in the wah tone.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency band affected by the filter.
parameters-en.Vol Sens: Controls how much input signal affects the speed of the effect. At 0%, the Speed is fixed; at higher values, Speed increases while playing and slows down as the signal decays.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
